hypothesis: If diffusion-based generative models trained on MP and OQMD produce crystal structures that, after DFT relaxation, exhibit small RMSD from their pre-relaxation coordinates and have formation energies placing them on or near the convex hull (energy above hull ≤ 0.1 eV/atom) while passing basic validity checks, then these models can reliably generate chemically valid and thermodynamically stable novel materials.
